scope_boundary: Only the bounded Project Theseus accelerator parity manifest import moves to prototype-backed: a sanitized public-safe fixture records one digest-pinned audit manifest with seven surfaces, seven MLX report summaries, four Metal report summaries, four artifact manifests, four scheduler-canary surfaces, zero hard failures, zero guardrail gaps, zero public training rows, zero external inference calls, no teacher use, no model-promotion allowance, no production-routing allowance, and nine expected-invalid controls. This does not promote the Project Theseus chapter core claim, prove full CUDA/MLX/Metal parity, production scheduler routing, model promotion, benchmark performance, model quality, deployment readiness, clean live Project Theseus replay, safety, alignment, transfer, or ASI.
transition_reason: The imported Theseus accelerator parity manifest has enough public-safe structure to be treated as a bounded prototype-backed audit-manifest import rather than a plan or dashboard impression: it preserves a concrete source digest, trigger state GREEN, seven surface rows, all MLX summaries present, four Metal summaries present, four artifact manifests, four scheduler-canary surfaces, public-safety zeros, model-promotion and production-routing locks, and negative controls for source mismatch, raw-report copying, non-GREEN source state, count drift, hidden hard failures, full-parity overclaim, production-routing overclaim, model-promotion overclaim, and chapter-core promotion. The accepted transition applies only to this import object.
